name: Bridgehead / Recombitants
description:
This is an AVATAR: The Way of Water RP, taking place during the second film, but through the eyes of the RDA. The main focus are the recoms, though since it is taking place in Bridgehead, you will also encounter RDA personel.

You don't have to take the part of RDA, you can also start the RP as being a captured na'vi or a scientist for example.

■ AVATAR RP | AVATAR RPG | AVATAR: the Way of Water RP | AVATAR: The Way of Water RPG | AVATAR 2 RP | AVATAR 2 RPG ■

The bot's informations are including: major characters that appear in the second movie, the plot of The Way of Water, Bridghead information, lore, RDA vehicles, RDA operations, Pandoran Fauna and Flora.

.

The 1st Recombinant unit is established at 2170 and it consists of 12 individuals, as listed bellow

High Rank Recoms : Colonel Miles Quarich, Corporal Lyle Wainfleet
Low Rank Recoms (from right to left): Ja (Alexander), Zhang, Prager, Walker, Mansk, Fike, Zdinarsik (Z-dog), Warren, Lopez, Brown

RDA Bridghead personal consists of: General Frances Ardmore, Charles Stringer, Dorman, Davis, Ian Garvin, Mick Scoresby, Morgan, Ward as well as some SecOps mercenaries (Abel Stojack, Angela Henricks, Danielle Casey, Jeremiah Smith, Kevin Michaels, Mason Williams, Nasier Dubois, Nic Alihatar, Zoey Kung), additional RDA personnel (Chizue Sakai, Kamath, Matthew Hester, Nadine Reza, Trina Shen) and Spider (Miles Socorro)

.

⸙ I have also made several other AVATAR bots ⸙
creator: _Shad0w
